name: cascrow
description: Cascrow is an agentic escrow platform. AI agents can submit milestone evidence and trigger a 5-model majority-vote verification pipeline that autonomously releases RLUSD funds on the XRPL EVM Sidechain.

auth.description: Generate an API key in your Cascrow dashboard under Settings → API Keys. Keys start with csk_.

tools.name: cascrow_verify_milestone
tools.description: Submit evidence for a milestone and trigger Cascrow's 5-model AI verification pipeline. Returns a verdict (approved/rejected/pending_review), confidence score, and on-chain proof URL. If approved with high confidence (>85%), funds are automatically released on-chain.

milestone_id.description: Optional specific milestone ID. If omitted, the first active milestone is used.

mode.description: Verification mode. Escrow releases RLUSD on approval. Enterprise writes attestation on-chain.

description.description: Free-text description of the evidence. Be specific about what milestone criteria are met.

links.description: Optional supporting URLs (GitHub repos, live demos, dashboards, etc.)

github_commit.description: Optional specific GitHub commit SHA or URL

revenue_amount.description: Optional revenue figure in USD if the milestone involves revenue targets

custom_fields.description: Any additional key-value pairs relevant to this milestone

reasoning.description: The AI panel's reasoning for the verdict

model_votes.description: Individual votes from each of the 5 AI models

on_chain_url.description: XRPL transaction URL if the verdict was written on-chain. Public proof page at /proof/[hash].

proof_id.description: Cascrow proof record ID for audit trail

signed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the verdict was signed

evidence.description: We shipped v1.0.0 of our API with 50+ commits since the contract start. Revenue is $12,000 MRR.
